hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must inspect recovery, vault, and writer modules plus docs to learn which authority feeds the verifier.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Fix requires coordinating replay windows, mirror reads, and summary emission rather than one function.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Repair shape with symptoms-only instruction; causes are discovered from code and transcripts.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Changing mirror selection affects writer digests and recovery cleanup ordering tests.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Failure mixes distributed recovery semantics, not a textbook CRUD or crypto exercise.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After honest disclosure of digest rules, work remains integrating authorities, not translating a single table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Bug is behavioral across scenarios, not guessing which of hundreds of files is corrupt.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping one manifest or checksum without code changes fails multi-wave tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier spans multiple replay orderings and restart paths, not one static tuple.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest symptoms do not name the broken mirror branch; search space stays broad.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Anti-cheat is standard regeneration deletes, not the sole source of hardness.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Core issue is semantic authority skew, not dependency pins or timeouts.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three separated module roots participate in flipping contract.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Planned oracle coordinates behavioral edits across three files, not one wholesale overwrite.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No tiny policy table captures the fix; logic spans procedural recovery flows.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns are banned on fix-path symbols; domain terms still appear in prose only.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No helper named validate_lineage or similar maps 1:1 to prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook safe-extract or schema-fill; requires runtime-specific diagnosis.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is recovery correctness, not merely exploit vocabulary.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requirements interact: mirror choice constrains digest emission and cleanup replay.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Docker provides isolation; difficulty is in code coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Agents must run sequences, compare transcripts, and revise hypotheses.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work matches professional distributed recovery debugging, not a day-one exercise.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Discovery budget lists three non-trivial obligations all living in environment code paths.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction stays symptoms-only per repair policy while docs carry disclosed formulas.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three topologies enumerated each require three coordinated loci and no single locus suffices.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic pytest over regenerated transcripts and digests.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public contract anchors on commands, paths, and documented schema.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert human can complete within hours given codebase access.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Coupled authorities and delayed symptoms exceed undergrad scope.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Mirrors paid incident work on control planes and data recovery services.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated artifacts, not narrated solution steps.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: instruction.md will describe symptoms and contracts only; choosing mirror versus store and sequencing cleanup requires reading code and running commands.

discovery_budget.discovery: Which reconciliation path still reads the mirror snapshot after live records refresh during cleanup.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming it collapses diagnosis to a single grep target.

discovery_budget.discovery: How replay window tagging reorders durable generation markers during overlapping reruns.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Would telegraph the exact ordering bug class.

discovery_budget.discovery: Why the writer emits summary digests that disagree with the durable envelope under late verifier passes.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating the bug as writer-only invites a one-file patch.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public text stays on observed mis-sync across reruns; formulas live in docs, not causal patch hints.

attack_path.summary: Grepping instruction nouns on fix symbols is blocked; naive mirror bypass fails late-wave tests; static JSON fails regeneration traps.
attack_path.reasoning: Each shortcut leaves at least one flipping contract test red while others may briefly pass.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Still requires retargeting reconciliation to durable envelopes, adjusting replay tagging, and aligning writer digests together.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Smallest honest English description spans three behavioral roots, not one knob.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure residual requires reasoning about authority precedence and ordering, not mapping one bullet to one function after formulas are visible in docs.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Even knowing digest formulas, the solver must decide when mirror inputs are legal and how cleanup interacts with generation markers across reruns.
red_flags: watch for summary-only tests without envelope checks
avoid naming restore phases in instruction

topology_enumeration.summary: Prioritize vault mirror correction then adjust writer digests while leaving recovery timing unchanged.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Mirror-only fixes leave writer emitting mismatched digests; writer-only fixes still read wrong inputs; recovery-only fixes do not repair summary trust.

topology_enumeration.summary: Repair replay window tagging first, then propagate corrections through vault reads and writer emission.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Window-only changes without vault alignment still feed stale identifiers; vault changes without writer updates leave summaries inconsistent.

topology_enumeration.summary: Start from summary emission correctness and backtrack to mirror selection and replay tagging.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Writer-only patch cannot choose correct envelopes if mirror path stays biased; recovery timing still corrupts generation tags.

symbol_table.purpose: Computes generation tagging across replay segments for downstream readers.
Selects reconciler inputs for durable reads versus cached views.
Builds externally visible digest records for verifier consumption.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Provides an alternate scheduling helper used only in optional diagnostics.
Maintains an archival ledger unrelated to live mirror selection.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Former name contained instruction nouns reconciler and digest stem collision risk.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: early transcript waves look healthy while later waves pull skewed lineage when cleanup overlaps replay.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models stop after first passing surface check without chaining reruns.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: failing behavior is visible through the documented command and transcript fields.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: restart and replay scenarios require idempotent merges without clobbering durable envelopes.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: a shortcut flush fixes one rerun but breaks another scenario.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: commands and fixtures are deterministic with seeded ordering.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: JSON transcripts, TOML fixtures, and vault byte records must agree on digest linkage.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: editing one format leaves orphans elsewhere.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: cross-format rules are documented in recovery_contract.md.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: mirror path returns consistent short-term answers that disagree with durable store after replay.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: local reads look coherent so the mirror is mistaken for truth.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: both paths are real code paths discoverable via reading modules.

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Expert can trace three roots using transcripts and docs within a few hours.
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: watch for static JSON writes, digest hardcoding, test edits, NOP oracle gaming.
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: drop mirror fix alone, drop writer fix alone, drop recovery window fix alone to show partial failures.

pass_rate_target.basis: stronger target agent on identical Harbor harness

metrics.criterion: transcript digests and envelope linkage match regenerated golden derivations from public rules.
cross-wave lineage and replay-boundary invariants hold under reruns.
no stale mirror fields after cleanup completes.
runner CLI and paths behave as documented across scenarios.
all required transcript sections populated without hand edits.

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt equals 1 only when every weighted semantic check passes in test_outputs.py.

subtype_milestone_plan.sequential_dependency: single-step task; ordering is expressed via stateful command sequences inside tests.
subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: all fixtures and transcripts are local; no network or multi-container services.

task_files.role: fix-frontier replay window and generation tagging
fix-frontier reconciler-facing mirror vs live record
solver-visible transcript schema and command semantics

fix_frontier.distribution: one module in recovery timing, one in vault mirror selection, one in writer summary path; each participates in distinct verifier clusters.
fix_frontier.naming_policy: opaque fix-path symbols per construction manifest; directory names stay generic engineering labels.
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: decoy modules perform plausible sibling work; fix-path symbols remain thin and renamed away from instruction nouns.

forbidden_assertion_styles: tests that only assert JSON presence

task_shape.hardness_source: diagnosis across replay windows, mirror read path, and summary emission without naming the defective branch
task_shape.collapse_risk: naming the restore boundary, flipping one trust bit on summaries, or patching a single cleanup ordering table

category_profile.challenge_family: crash-consistent recovery with replay-window lineage skew and false-green summaries
category_profile.bug_family: crash-consistent recovery with replay-window lineage skew and false-green summaries
category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: crash/restart workflow, durability expectation, recovery command, regenerated transcript path, externally tested digest and idempotence behavior.
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: journal internals, exact broken phase, mirror function names, cleanup ordering recipe, or which module ignores the durable envelope.
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: partial writes, replay, cleanup windows, idempotent reruns, and verifier-visible digest provenance must stay aligned after disclosure.
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: nondeterministic crash injection, hidden golden digests, tests that read private vault internals instead of public transcripts.
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds a promoted-reference-calibrated recovery task emphasizing shadow-vs-live authority and summary-vs-store divergence, distinct from pure filesystem reconstruction.

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low; roots split recovery, vault, writer with neutral directory tokens.
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: medium; instruction must disclose transcript fields and digest rules as derivations, not per-row expected literals.
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low; manifest caps fix-path fan-in and pairs co-resident helpers explicitly.
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: medium; every digest field, rerun command, and envelope rule must be mirrored into instruction.md or environment docs.

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: instruction.md names the python runner that writes the transcript path and the pytest entry the harness uses.
actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: instruction.md states /app/environment source must be repaired so the normal pipeline regenerates outputs.
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: instruction.md states tests delete the transcript and rerun generation across crash/restart scenarios.
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: digest linkage formulas and envelope identities live in environment/app/docs/recovery_contract.md and are summarized without patch steps in instruction.md.
actionability_plan.schema_home: top-level transcript schema (runs, waves, envelope references, digest records) documented in recovery_contract.md and echoed at a high level in instruction.md.

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: No checker false positives anticipated; synthetic pattern stays inside standard collapse and output-contract policy.

realism_source.evidence_basis: No single upstream CVE or public patch; distilled from operator reports about recovery managers that reconcile against stale mirrors and accept summary digests.
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Exception justified because the seed encodes a recurring control-plane class (post-restart false greens) while remaining fully local and evidence-anchored.
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Delayed symptom after early mutation, multiple internally consistent authorities, replay ordering effects, and verifier trust in the wrong surface.
realism_source.synthetic_exception_review: Category profile state_recovery_crash_consistency applied; instruction stays symptoms-only; output contract uses observation transcripts not boolean verdict maps; discovery budget names three non-obvious code obligations; waivers not used to bypass fairness.
